completed.summary: E2E tests for pause/resume exist in gameplay.spec.ts (lines 280-374). Both tests FAIL: (1) Escape key opens closes — pauseTextVisible check uses gs.pauseOverlay.children.list which doesn't exist on Phaser Group (use getChildren() instead). (2) Resume button close — keyboard event doesn't reliably reach Phaser in headless mode. The pause overlay ITSELF works correctly on live site (verified visually). Test bugs, not game bugs.

Added Playwright test 'tribe cards are sorted alphabetically on SelectScene' in gameplay.spec.ts. Uses page.evaluate to read Text objects from SelectScene children.list, filters by known tribe names, and asserts alphabetical order (Bardur, Cymanti, Elyrion, Imperius, Oumaji, Polaris, Xin-xi). Test passes. All 492 vitest tests pass.

Added Playwright test verifying mute persistence (localStorage init read + click handler fires + reload reads stored value). Adapted from live-toggle to persistence-only because WebAudio context is no-op in headless. Test passes (32.9s). 492 vitest tests pass. 2 pre-existing E2E test bugs remain (documented in spec_gaps). Written for existing feature (89517e5), not alongside new code — correct methodology.

Added territorial tile scoring (+20 per unique tile). City claims tiles within city.level hex distance. Overlapping territories deduplicated via Set. Optional allCoords parameter for map boundary. 5 new tests: L1=140, L3=740, overlap dedup, captured=0, no-allCoords=0. 497 tests pass.
Added exploration scoring (+5 per explored fog tile). ScoreCalculator accepts optional exploredCount param. Reads from GameState.tribeVisibility.size. 5 new tests. 502 tests pass.

spec_gaps.evidence: GDD §1 — territorial scoring done (8b96a53). Exploration pending.

spec_gaps.item: E2E pause overlay tests have test bugs (children.list on Group)
spec_gaps.evidence: gameplay.spec.ts line 320: gs.pauseOverlay.children.list.filter — Phaser Group.children is a Set, not a Container. Use getChildren() instead. Test returns null (evaluate error) instead of checking text presence.

spec_gaps.item: E2E tech panel test uses unscaled pixel coords
spec_gaps.evidence: gameplay.spec.ts line 241: click(page, 530, 10) uses canvas pixel coords but game has scale factor ~0.96 (FIT mode 800x600→769x577). Misses the actual button at game coord (530,10).

spec_gaps.item: E2E city menu close test fails — click at (400,300) overlaps city position
spec_gaps.evidence: Click at canvas center (400,300) after city menu opens doesn't close it. City is also at (400,300) screen position, so click lands on city hex (re-opening menu) rather than clearing it. Click at (100,50) correctly closes menu. Test position is wrong.

spec_gaps.item: City menu missing name, population, production indicator
spec_gaps.evidence: Browser verification: city menu shows trainable units and upgrades but no city name, population count, or production indicator.

spec_gaps.item: Tech panel missing star balance display
spec_gaps.evidence: Browser verification: tech panel shows tech tree with costs but no current star balance indicator.

note: Player tick: add-exploration-scoring complete (d543c56). Exploration scoring +5 per explored fog tile via GameState.tribeVisibility. 502 tests pass. No remaining tasks in AGENTS.md.
